name: Iterum
short_description: Conquer Gaul in Caesar's legendary campaigns. Every choice shapes your empire—will you lead it to glory or ruin? Keep your people fed, your cities thriving, and your legions strong as you forge your legacy through the ages.
detailed_description:
Engage in tile-based tactical real-time combat, where every maneuver and flanking action can turn the tide of battle. Position your units carefully to outsmart your opponents and secure victory on the field.

Oversee the survival and prosperity of your city through deep seasonal yield management. Store grain for the winter, adapt to unpredictable hazards, and balance rations, taxes, and happiness to keep your people thriving. High taxes and generous rations can both shape your city's fate, just like in classic survival city-builders.

Build and fortify settlements at key locations, exploit and refine resources, and maintain vital supply lines to support your armies on campaign. Every decision matters as you expand your influence and defend your realm.

Experience Caesar's legendary Gallic Wars campaign, meticulously researched from Julius Caesar's own Commentarii de Bello Gallico. Follow the historic conquest of Gaul as never seen before in games. Beyond the campaign, unleash your creativity with a custom script-based map editor to design your own scenarios and craft unique challenges in the age of the Roman Empire.

supported_languages:
English*, Swedish*, French, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Irish, Welsh, Polish, Traditional Chinese, Ukrainian, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
